T0153.title: Sexual-Lure Traffic
T0153.definition: Refers to users lured in by scammers who post sexually suggestive or provocative content. These posts often operate in a legal gray zone, exploiting curiosity or desire to attract a large number of users—primarily male—to click, follow, add as a friend, or visit specific links. The acquisition and sale of such leads is a common tactic in online fraud operations.
